name: Zoom Whiteboard
description: Connect Cline to Zoom Whiteboard through this MCP server configuration from the imported plugin marketplace bundle.

env.name: ZOOM_WHITEBOARD_MCP_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.description: Zoom Whiteboard value for zoom whiteboard mcp access token.

install.notes: Imported from plugin bundle config `zoom-plugin/.mcp.json`. The remote server requires the configured HTTP header values at runtime.
